programme.title: House of the Dragon S3
programme.desc: Based on George R.R. Martin’s “Fire & Blood,” the series, set 200 years before the events of “Game of Thrones,” tells the story of House Targaryen.

programme.title: Dracula Untold
programme.desc: The origin story of the man who became Dracula. Vlad III, Prince of Wallachia, enters into a Faustian pact to save his people and becomes inflicted with an insatiable thirst for human blood.

programme.title: Eddington
programme.desc: In May of 2020, a standoff between a small-town sheriff (Joaquin Phoenix) and mayor (Pedro Pascal) sparks a powder keg as neighbor is pitted against neighbor in Eddington, New Mexico.

programme.title: He's Just Not That Into You
programme.desc: An interconnected group of young adults navigates their relationships, from the shallow end of the dating pool through the deep, murky waters of married life.

programme.title: Reality
programme.desc: On June 3, 2017, 25-year-old former American intelligence specialist Reality Winner is confronted by FBI agents arriving at her home to question her suspected role in the mishandling of classified information. Based on true events, the film’s dialogue is directly from the transcript of their tense and transfixing conversation.

programme.title: Scoob!

programme.title: A Christmas Mystery

programme.title: The First Wives Club

programme.title: Like Crazy

programme.title: Ruby and the Well S1

programme.desc: Princess Syllabob, the blobby daughter of Axalotly, King of the Deep, has been carried off by a gang of gulls and discarded on the forest floor.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe S2
programme.desc: Struck down by a poisonous turnip, Prince Ivandoe & Bert must seek a cure from the Wise Wizard of Wisdom.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe S2
programme.desc: Feral and her gang of cat-thieves have stolen Prince Ivandoe's map to Eagle Mountain. Cupcake, the pink-poodle survivalist offers to train Prince Ivandoe to become a Jungle Warrior

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe S2
programme.desc: Whilst travelling through the notoriously dangerous Forest of Outlaws, Prince Ivandoe is repeatedly Princenapped!

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe S2
programme.desc: Prince Ivandoe is a prisoner in the castle dungeon of Jezabel's mother, Grizabella - the unpredictable and slightly terrifying 'Queen of Thieves'.

programme.title: The Life & Times of Juniper Lee S1
programme.desc: Auntie Roon, an ancient and cranky fish-riding witch, is returned from eight hundred years of banishment.

programme.title: The Life & Times of Juniper Lee S1
programme.desc: June is overwhelmed balancing her personal life with being the Te Xuan Ze until a 'helper elf' appears.

programme.title: The Life & Times of Juniper Lee S1
programme.desc: Demons plot to kidnap Ray Ray and hold him ransom for a magical goblet.

programme.title: A Minecraft Movie
programme.desc: Four misfits struggling with ordinary problems are pulled through a portal into the Overworld.

programme.title: Pacific Rim
programme.desc: A sci-fi action epic about a ragtag band of humans coming together in the year 2020 to fight legions of monstrous creatures rising from the sea.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: While visiting China, Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max take a trek to the Great Wall, but their adventure is nearly ruined by daredevils LaGrange and Vin Ethanol trying to jump the international monument, and Ben must hop into the Rustbuggy to chase away the fast and furious foes.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: During a family cookout at a forest campsite, Charmcaster users her magic to switch places with Gwen, but when Ben catches 'Charmcaster' sneaking about, he attacks- unaware it's actually his cursed cousin!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: In Aspen, Colorado, Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max are on a hike to find the Forgeti, but when they realize they've stumbled upon Billy Billions own 'Winter in July' ski resort, Ben must battle Billy-with an assist from the Forgeti itself.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Ben hops into the Rustbuggy for a driving lesson along the sand dunes of Cape Cod, but he takes a freaky switchback turn when the Rustbuggy is mutated into a motor-monster by Bootleg - another alien transformation of Kevin 11, with powers similar to Upgrade!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Team Tennyson travel to the Chrysalen Institute for some hot yoga and good vibes, only to find that the Bugg Brothers are on vacation, too- but are the sneaky insectoids really on holiday, or just cooking up yet another silly, yet high stakes scheme?

programme.desc: With the 70s behind him, San Diego's top rated newsman, Ron Burgundy, returns to take New York's first 24-hour news channel by storm.

programme.title: The Gilded Age S1
programme.desc: Bertha goes all out at a luncheon to impress Mr. McAllister, enlisting the help of Bannister - who rubs Church the wrong way.

programme.title: Jane Fonda in Five Acts
programme.desc: An intimate look at Oscar®-winner Jane Fonda's journey, which was marked by controversy, tragedy and transformation.

programme.title: Deadwood: The Movie
programme.desc: Set in 1876, when the richest gold strike in U.S. history drew a throng of restless misfits to an outlaw settlement in the Black Hills of South Dakota.

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War
programme.desc: The story before Snow White: During the war between two queens, the huntsman must vanquish the evil queen before her wickedness rules for eternity.

programme.title: The Second Civil War
programme.desc: A HBO Original Movie about how a simple immigration issue spins wildly out of control for those involved, ranging from the US President to a news producer.

programme.title: The Leisure Class
programme.desc: The winning entry from HBO's Project Greenlight about a man trying to marry into a wealthy family and his wild, unpredictable brother who could ruin everything.

programme.title: Must Love Dogs
programme.desc: A lady sets out to change her single status by putting up a personal ad but realises she has too much to handle when men respond to the ad.

programme.title: O.G.
programme.desc: O.G. follows Louis (Wright), a maximum-security prison inmate on the cusp of release from a sentence he's served for the last 24 years.

programme.title: King Richard

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: During the Lunar New Year festival, Alex is bummed to learn that there's no Year of the Lion. programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop help Dad discover the true meaning of family trips. / When the Great Great Grandicorn comes to visit, the kids learn that making mistakes is part of learning.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Tag wants to bring her new neighbor, Scooch, to the Party in the Tree. But a series of traffic jams make Tag impatient, and she keeps trying to find different ways to get to the party. Thanks to Tag’s handiness - and one of Lady Lydia’s hats - they make it to the party just in time. \ Pawston’s new canine mail carrier keeps getting chased by dogs, so Tag and Scooch have to help him deliver the mail.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Tag and Scooch team up to get all of Scooch's chores done in time for the Barkapellas Bark In the Park In the Dark concert. \ Tag is so excited to join the Sam Whippet’s Race Cadets. But when Tag and Scooch show up at the racetrack, there’s lots of competition. And to complete the first challenge - a pedal car race - they’re going to have to work together.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: Ari moves in to Harmony Harbor, but notices something strange involving a group of kids, a Noodle Truck chef and her pet squirrel. / After Ari discovers the secret of Team Zenko Go, he asks to join the crew. But first he must learn the importance of teamwork.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Donna's delivery truck breaks down, it's up to the crew to help Donna continue delivering packages to Harmony Harbor's residents. / When the crew takes on a mission to rescue a lost pet, Ellie must face her fears in order to help save the day.

programme.desc: When the Rescue Riders save Viking chief Duggard, they’re invited to visit his village of Huttsgalor, where they must prove they're kind and helpful.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Dak's lack of planning gets him, Cutter and Winger lost with Elbone in the Maze Caves, and Leyla's overthinking threatens the effort to rescue them.

programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes—why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse

For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.desc: Peabody and Sherman celebrate historical lasts but their guests get lost in NYC, so Peabody must continue the show without the neighbors creating chaos.

programme.desc: After absorbing the mystical Hero Chi of the Four Constellations, four panda kids enlist the Dragon Master to teach them Kung Fu

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws Of Destiny

programme.title: DRAGONS 9 REALMS S2

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: After injecting all the teachers with bee DNA, the Melvins run the new "hivemind" of the school. But Ms. Ribble is accidently injected with too much "Bee- NA" and becomes the queen bee, overpowering the Melvins' control. George, Harold and the recently re-hired Vice Principal Krupp must work with the Melvins and stop her from turning everyone into her Zombees.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: In hopes of raising their grades so they can go to Lake Summer Camp, George and Harold must teach Ratrick, their assigned rat, a simple task. But Ratrick runs away into the sewers where he is doused with toxic waste and transformed into Poopacabra! It's now up to the boys and Captain Underpants to stop the beast before it takes over Piqua with its stench, and more importantly, ruins the boys' chances to go to Lake Summer Camp.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: George and Harold decide to do an extra credit project on dinosaurs to help their chances of getting summer camp-worthy grades. When Melvin brings in a dinosaur frozen in ice, the boys try to get rid of it. But the ice thaws and they meet Diddlysaurus, a prankster raptor who's huge fans of the boys. He offers to help them with their project if he can pull pranks with them, but when the pranks go too far, the boys and Captain Underpants have to deal with the dino.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: Struggling to find their purpose on the Betterman farm, the Croods see an opportunity to prove their worth by harvesting Phil’s perilous (and sticky) bounceberries.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Eep wants alone time with her new friend Dawn, Guy seeks a new friend of his own and finds an unlikely companion in Thunk.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When the Bettermans invite the Croods to join their family game night, two things become clear: Phil needs to win and Grug hates to lose.

programme.title: DRAGONS 9 REALMS S2
programme.desc: When Phil threatens to shut down D’Angelo’s new dragon hospital and ban dragons from ICARIS, D’Angelo and a little Hobgobbler have to change his mind.

programme.title: DRAGONS 9 REALMS S2
programme.desc: While Tom struggles with admitting his feelings for Jun, the pair find themselves trapped inside a giant tree with an anxious colony of Woodchipper dragons.

programme.title: DRAGONS 9 REALMS S2
programme.desc: Thunder must wrangle and lead the Hero Dragons in a desperate attempt to save Tom and the riders from a dangerous new dragon, The Glass Caster.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: After the events of the Boss Baby 2 film, adult businessman Theodore Templeton is framed for embezzling from his company and forced to revert back to his old Boss Baby self and crash with his brother Tim. But to pull this off, he'll need to win over Tim's family into letting him stay, and convince Baby Corp to give him back his old job... which is currently held by his baby niece Tina.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Tina and Boss adjust to co-boss responsibilities while on a mission to rescue the baby with the best hair in the world from a lice outbreak. With opposing leadership views, the two split the existing field team's focus and discover a new archenemy in Lumpy the Park Duck.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: After a baby says a swear word on live television (censored by child-friendly online filter Sheriff Potty Pardner), Boss becomes obsessed with proving that the baby was taught this filth by their new arch-nemesis, Lumpy the Park Duck. Meanwhile, Tina's search to find what that swear word means creates unintentional havoc for both Tabitha's research paper and for Baby Corp's online systems when Sheriff Potty Pardner gives them an "internet time out"

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po, at the top of his game but lonely, comes across two weasels stealing an earthquake causing gauntlet and tries to stop them, but inadvertently destroys a town. He loses his title as Dragon Master and teams up with Wandering Blade, a knight on a mission from England, to track down the weasels and get his title back.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and Blade's personalities clash as they track Klaus and Veruca and fight off some of Po's old foes. Blade gets to see Po's kung fu mastery, but doesn't agree to team up with him until she realizes that he accidentally holds the key to finding Klaus and Veruca: he has a piece of the WuGao Gauntlet. Meanwhile, Klaus and Veruca continue on their path of destruction while looking for the mysterious "Lotus".

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po's moral lines are blurred when he and Blade have to break an untrustworthy hedgehog monk (Zhen) out of jail to get more information on what Klaus and Veruca stole from the Lotus. They learn from Zhen that there are in fact three more weapons, and Po recognizes one of them from a comic book.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim warms up to the idea of being the Trollhunter until he faces Bular, who is determined to destroy him, so he seeks help in Blinky and AAARRRGGHH!!

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim is not welcomed by the Trolls as their new Trollhunter, and he suffers a humiliating defeat at the hands of Draal

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim undertakes his first Trollhunting mission by starting small: he must shrink down to eight inches tall to apprehend a mischievous gnome.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja, Krel, and Vex explore Earth looking for technology to repair their ship. When the high school Principal demands to meet Aja and Krel's guardians, the Royal teens transform two maintenance robots (Blanks) to pose as their "human" parents.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: In an effort to blend in with their surroundings, Krel engineers a device to get into the "mind-set" of humans and ends up discovering far more than he expected. Meanwhile, General Morando's bounty hunters close in on the Royals.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When an alien beetle infestation threatens to expose their true identities, the Royals must depend on a new ally for help. Meanwhile, Zadra joins Morando’s army as a double agent who secretly spies on him for the growing Resistance.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes masks and capes for her and Pandy, they become the dollhouse defenders and must save the Gabby Cats from Bad Guy CatRat! In the Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Kitty Fairy sings a song about her garden magic!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a snow globe shaped like the dollhouse, she notices the rooms inside are all cattywampus and in the wrong place. After a series of wacky misadventures that result in CatRat becoming a craft version of himself, Gabby figures out they need to fix the dollhouse globe to return everything back to normal.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Game Show Day in the dollhouse! Our wily and well-groomed host, CatRat, leads Gabby and Pandy around the dollhouse, where they compete in Gab-ified games, like Tushy Tunes on the “butt xylophone” couch and a cooking competition of Bakey with Cakey. They win tickets and trade them in for prizes at the end.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse

Pirate Gabby and Pirate Pandy head out on their journey across the many “lands” of the dollhouse to find the Gabby Cats Treasure!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business

programme.title: Casper's Scare School

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The dollhouse delivery is a spaceship that takes off with a sleeping CatRat inside! Gabby, Pandy, and Kitty Fairy have to get the ship back into The Fairy Tail Garden before Floyd (who thinks it's the best kitty toy ever!) gets his paws on it!

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When the banana bread Harper leaves out for Eden is stolen, the Dew Drops create a sting operation to catch the thief. / When Captain Meow Meow gets a splinter in his paw and hears the word "vet," he flees. Now it's up to the Dew Drops to find Captain Meow Meow and get that splinter out.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When Harper's drone flies away it’s up to the Dew Drops to get it back. programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: There's a mystery in the dollhouse! programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When CatRat gets stuck on planet Caturn, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go save him. programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Lala, who's grown into a froglet, is ready to finally join the gang on a big adventure in the city! But she relies on her water bowl to get around, and Gloria goes overboard in trying to protect her tiny friend in the big world- only to realize that she underestimated all Lala is capable of doing.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When a snowstorm blocks Kate from accessing the zoo, Melman decides to become “substitute Kate” and make sure the animals are cared for. programme.title: Team Zenko Go

programme.title: Team Zenko Go

programme.desc: Burple gets spooked by the legend of a ghost called the Phantom Fang. But when he senses the story is real, he can't get his friends to believe him.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: After Boss insults Tina's imaginary friend, he's forced into "Imaginary Friend Sensitivity Training" at Baby Corp. programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: It's a turf war when Bounce House Bruiser Baby encroaches on Delivery Baby's tricycle park! Determined to win this kid over, Tina ends up going rogue as a trike hoodlum, and her own field team is forced to reign her in.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Boss takes an overdue vacation day, and ends up teaching Tabitha the value of "trading up" valueless objects into something she actually wants, an electric scooter. programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and Blade must convince a deceased comic book writer's son to give them information about an unreleased comic that may point them toward the next weapon: a whip of fire. Torn between saving Po and the mission she's sworn to complete, Blade flees and abandons Po.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: A mysterious figure helps Po escape the guards, so Po makes his way to a desert market, determined to prove Blade wrong for leaving him behind. But the mysterious figure has followed Po and tries to capture them, clearly a new threat to our team.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: With a map from the comic book, Po and Blade make the treacherous journey through the desert to the lost city, and once inside they find the guardian of the fire whip, Rukhmini. The mysterious figure, a stag named Colin, forges an uneasy alliance with Klaus and Veruca.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Jim and Toby investigate a Goblin attack, they discover Changelings are secretly living amongst them and rebuilding the Killahead Bridge!

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Everything comes into perspective when Jim discovers his re-match with Draal is to the death.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: After Jim finds the Killahead Bridge has been moved, he must use a horseshoe to find who in Arcadia is a changeling.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja and Krel's search for parts to repair the Mothership leads them to Driver's Ed -- and a high speed run-in with the Zeron Brotherhood. Meanwhile, Zadra begins spying on Morando's sinister plans.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Stuck in a time-loop, Aja finds unlikely help from Jim Lake and Team Trollhunters. Meanwhile, a giant Troll rampages the Arcadia High Science Fair, threatening to expose both the Troll world and Aja and Krel’s alien secret.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: A menacing school board Administrator demands Aja and Krel's immigration papers to register for school - a task that turns dangerous for the two "illegal Aliens." Meanwhile, Aja bejins her warrior training with Vex

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: It’s revealed that Cleve is building a massive weather machine that is generating dangerous desert storms, with the help of a genius North African teen named Ziri. When Cleve creates a sandstorm to take out the crew, they’re saved by two Bedouin brothers named Kareem and Salem (and their pack of camels). Echo questions her ability to be a good leader and if they should give up. But after the storm clears, Tony challenges the brothers to a camel race in order to get their help tracking down Cleve – and he wins! Now the Bedouins have to take the kids to the Eye of the Sahara, a huge strange storm that they know has something to do with Cleve’s plot. Elsewhere in the Sahara, Ms. Nowhere and Gary are captured by Cleve.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The kids manage to make it through the crazy storm and build gliders out of parts of the fallen spy plane to travel closer to Cleve’s base and save Nowhere and Gary. Cleve sees the kids on his satellite feeds and sends a bunch of drones to take them out. During the aerial battle, Cisco splits off and leads the drones away so that the rest of the crew can escape, causing him to be lost alone in the giant storm

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The kids hatch a plan to take down Cleve and rescue Ms. Nowhere and Gary. Meanwhile, despite interference from Ziri, Cleve successfully begins to launch his satellites into space, which will allow him to use his weather machine to destroy Earth’s major cities and transform the Sahara into the only oasis. In order to stop the satellites, the team engages in an all-out battle against Cleve, Matsuo, and Rafaela. Just when it looks like our guys have the upperhand, Cleve shows them he has one last trick up his sleeve – a mech suit!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Cleve has the team surrounded – is this the end? Suddenly, Cisco bursts in to save the day, along with all of the friends the team has made along the way in the Sahara. Working together, they manage to stop Cleve’s missiles and defeat Rafaela and Matsuo. But before they get a chance to celebrate, a giant fire tornado tears its way through the Sahara destroying everything in its path. Tony decides to make one last daring attempt in order to save the day.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: After an epic chase around the globe, the team finally catches Rafaela, making it Ms. Nowhere's 100th arrest - and the agency is throwing her a party! Meanwhile, Cisco's uncle Tuco, a famous luchador in Mexico, is visiting town promoting his next show. But the celebration comes to a halt when there's an explosion at the party and an attack by a mysterious group of criminals!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse

programme.desc: When Donna decides to show off her not-so-flashy skills as a magician at the Community Center talent show, the Zenkos must do everything they can to save her act from becoming an embarrassing disaster. / After Sam’s favorite skateboard accidentally gets put in with donations Mr. Tanaka is collecting for a fundraiser, the team is led on a merry chase as the skateboard passes from one Harmony Harbor denizen to another.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: Little Lula has set up a lemonade stand, but she’s not getting any business. The Zenkos swing into action to send customers her way. / When Donna, Fawna and Rona have a spat, the triplets’ longstanding annual tradition of viewing a comet together is in jeopardy. Now it’s up to Team Zenko to get the three feuding sisters back together again before the comet streaks by.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: The Rescue Riders get stuck in a cave with their rival, Magnus, during a race to find a new source of an important mineral.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Frustrated that she's not fitting in with the team, Aggro goes off on her own with Elbone on a mission to save a dragon egg trapped in ice.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a cup of crayons and a coloring book with the same doodle on every page. When she takes it into The dollhouse each of the Gabby Cats sees something different in the doodle and turns it into a uniquely magical drawing. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's time for a safari adventure in the dollhouse! Carlita, decked out like a safari truck, takes Gabby and Pandy on an adventure through the dollhouse as they follow clues to find the mysterious Felis Catus and discover all kinds of other dollhouse wildlife along the way! For the COTD segment, Cakey and Parrot show us how to make adorable safari snacks.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody And Sherman Show
programme.desc: Christine won't release Peabody from handcuffs until he lets her sing; the Wright Brothers must get their plane back from a flock of angry birds

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody And Sherman Show
programme.desc: Sherman goes gaga when his favorite snack in the world, Guapo Taco Pudding, sponsors the show; beautiful Cleopatra turns out to be a belching queen.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots
programme.desc: Puss misses the old days adventuring with his buddy Jack Sprat. Fearful he will leave San Lorenzo, Dulcinea concocts a super special adventure surprise with the orphans. But Jack Sprat shows up with the promise of a damsel in distress… who turns out to be a super scary monster.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots
programme.desc: Puss and Dulcinea embark on an adventure to find the Fountain of Youth to save Puss' old mentor, El Guante Blanco.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws Of Destiny
programme.desc: When Po discovers he was poisoned, he sets off to a caravan oasis in the hopes of finding out who the perpetrator is, unknowingly followed by the kid

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws Of Destiny
programme.desc: When Po and the kids stop for the night at an Inn, they meet a gang who wants to fight Po and end up down a path to uncovering Jindiao's evil plan

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: With academy life on the horizon, the PALs work together to tame wild yearling Governor before they leave. But maybe he's not meant to be broken.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: Lucky doesn't want her friends to miss their favorite Miradero traditions while they're away at school. So why not celebrate them all in one day?

programme.title: DRAGONS 9 REALMS S2
programme.desc: Tom and the riders must finally overcome their differences and come together as a team to survive the Dark Realm.

programme.title: DRAGONS 9 REALMS S2
programme.desc: Tom attempts to defeat the World Serpent by emulating Hiccup.

programme.title: DRAGONS 9 REALMS S2
programme.desc: Tom and the dragon riders foster displaced Hidden Realm dragons in Rakke Town but things get complicated when Mr. Rakke makes a surprise visit.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: When Krupp transfers to another school, George and Harold follow, only to find a bizarro version of Jerome Horwitz Elementary, where the teachers are nice and the kids are well-behaved. But no one's having any fun! George and Harold want to right this wrong with pranks and comics. But Krupp enlists Mr. Neamer (bizarro Meaner), who then super-enlargers his brain and becomes Brainy Blabulous, in order to stop the subversion of authority.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: In order to spice up their field trip to Romeinday (an ancient Rome reenactment park), George and Harold trick Melvin into turning the bus into a time machine so they can travel to actual ancient Rome and be gladiators. After offending Caesar with their comic, the emperor is accidentally turned into Cruelius Sneezer and pursues the school group with all his might.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: In honor of Dump Day in Piqua- celebrating the creation of the dump - George and Harold try to earn extra credit by creating a trash-alanche. But Melvin creates an invention to suck all the trash into another dimension. The plan backfires when Tubbadump, a trash-covered monster, emerges from that dimension for revenge on the trashmakers.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: Bored of the viewing options on window, Thunk realizes what he’s been missing – real life drama! But when Thunk starts creating drama around the farm, the others set out to teach him a lesson.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: Sandy is finally old enough to join Grug and Eep for the annual Daddy Daughter Day and Grug couldn’t be more excited. But when Sandy struggles to fit in with Grug and Eep’s traditions, Grug has second thoughts. It isn’t until Sandy goes missing that Grug realizes it’s time to start a new tradition.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Phil humiliates himself playing throw-go-nut with the punch monkeys, the Croods band together to help him regain his confidence. Unfortunately, Phil goes from confident to cocky and bets the farm on a game of throw-go-nut with the punch monkeys. Can the Croods overcome the punch monkeys - and Phil - to save the farm?

programme.title: DRAGONS 9 REALMS S2
programme.desc: Tom and the riders must finally overcome their differences and come together as a team to survive the Dark Realm.

programme.title: DRAGONS 9 REALMS S2
programme.desc: Tom attempts to defeat the World Serpent by emulating Hiccup.

programme.title: DRAGONS 9 REALMS S2
programme.desc: Tom and the dragon riders foster displaced Hidden Realm dragons in Rakke Town but things get complicated when Mr. Rakke makes a surprise visit.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Boss searches for evidence that Tabitha's best friend is an Uncuddleable, but is sidetracked by a Templeton Family tradition: "The War of the Cheeks", a Go Fish tournament where the winner gets to make family rules for a whole day. When Yvette joins in, Boss has to keep her from winning, out of fear that an evil babysitter will make family rules that overturn the Templeton household.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Trying to win Tabitha's loyalty for Baby Corp, Boss and Tina invite her to Techy Tykes, a technology convention at their office. But when the top-secret UBO goes missing, the outsiders Tabitha and Tim (who's tagged along to relive his glory days) immediately become the number one suspects.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Missing his old life on his birthday, Boss tries to have a full-fledged grown-up celebration in Chicago, but Carol is the only one able to chauffeur and take care of him. The two battle at every stop of the birthday party tour, but when Boss's old work nemesis sets him up for an Federal Investigation Sting at an improv comedy show, Boss and Carol are forced to work together to escape the law.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: In order to earn the fire whip, Po and Blade have to get themselves and Rukhmini out of a lost city with no exits, but Rukhimi’s not exactly who she says she is. Our villains’ alliance shatters when Colin realizes the weasels are mages with magical powers, and he leaves Klaus gravely injured.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Klaus is injured and Veruca’s mage powers are not working, stifled by her time in prison. They encounter a dangerous village and Veruca reconnects with her abilities in time to save Klaus, but the two are soon captured by Po and Blade, who are unaware of Veruca’s rekindled powers.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and Blade head to the docks to take Klaus and Veruca to England, and Po tries to have fun with her on their last day together. However, Klaus and Veruca break free and hold Po hostage; Blade shockingly gives up the location of the fire whip to save him.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim finds a Changeling when babysiting for Claire & finally has proof for Trollmarket but can't tell Claire; Meanwhile AAARRRGGHH!! moves in with Toby.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim is excited to test-drive a Vespa for his birthday but things quickly go awry when he must fight Bular's flying Vulture Troll sent to hunt him down.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim uses a courage-enhancing "Grit Shaka" to accelerate his training, but nearly gets himself killed when he hunts down Bular and Toby must save him.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja attends her first teem party, Krel goes hunting for an urban legend with Eli, but the kids' fun is ruined when the Zeron Brotherhood crash their night. Meanwhile, Vex receives a message from Akiridion-5.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: In the flipside of Trollhunters Ep. 222, Aja and Krel embark on a journey with Jim, Toby, and Claire, who Krel believes are the Zeron Brotherhood in disguise. Meanwhile, Aja’s missing Serrtaor embarks on a journey of its own.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Aja and Krel learn a secret, military base may house an alien spacecraft, they enlist Stuart to help them infilitrate it. Meanwhile, General Morando unviels his latest weapon - Omen, a deadly, cyborg assassin.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: The world’s worst baby is on the loose and Boss Baby, Tim and the team must find him before he turns the whole neighborhood against babies

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: When an unexpected kitten shows up on Boss Baby’s doorstep, they go head to head against the feline enemy

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: Meet Ty Rux and his buddy Revvit as they join forces with the giant Dinotrux team that are half dinosaur, half construction truck and full-on fun!

programme.title: Dinotrux

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: Turbo must become a hero by saving the city from a menacing tiger beetle, who has challenged him to a race on an insane stunt-filled obstacle course.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Revenge of the Creature Catcher Casper, Mantha and Ra accidentally lead Jimmy's father to the underworld.Slugby. To prove that the teachers haven't gone soft, Alder and Dash stage a Slugby match.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: You Oughta Be in Pictures When Mantha sees a Deedstown mob attacking a group of fellow zombies, she's determined to lead them in a counterattack. Crypt Critters Mantha comes down with an embarrassing case of crypt critters, but refuses to go to the nurse.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When 6 adorable hamster kitties get loose in the dollhouse, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box head out to look for them. Along the way, Baby Box learns a lot about hamster kitties, which convinces Mama Box to let them live in the Craft Room.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When Harper unknowingly drops her cooking camp application on the way to post office, it’s up to the Dew Drops to get it into that big blue mailbox. / When Cassie accidentally places Lola's beloved, old toy wand in a box marked for a giveaway drive in the park, the Dew Drops must find a way to retrieve the wand before it ends up in the hands of an entirely new family.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: Marcus has a piano recital and unknowingly forgets his lucky penny at home. programme.desc: A cop relies on a young car thief to take down four gangsters who plan to rob a rich merchant

programme.desc: A restaurateur teams up with a police officer and his ex-con brother to avenge the death of a friend's daughter

programme.title: Rambo: Last Blood
programme.desc: John Rambo's peaceful life is interrupted when Gabriela, his friend's granddaughter, disappears in Mexico. He decided to free her from the clutches of local cartels, starting a cycle of revenge

programme.title: Black Mask
programme.desc: A survivor of a super-soldier project must fight his former comrades as a masked hero

programme.title: Mukoku
programme.desc: Kengo was also accomplished in kendo, but he stopped participating in the martial art activity after an incident. Now, he spends his days drinking and working as a security guard at a station building. Based on novel "Mukoku" by Shu Fujisawa.

programme.title: Acts of Violence
programme.desc: Three Midwestern brothers, a crime lord, and an incorruptible cop are on a deadly collision course when the youngest brother's fiancée is kidnapped by human traffickers.

programme.title: Fist of Fury
programme.desc: A young man seeks vengeance for the death of his teacher

programme.title: Project Silence
programme.desc: Silence takes place when an accident occurs on a foggy bridge and, as a result, an unknown beast is unleashed.

programme.title: Outbreak
programme.desc: A Psychological Thriller about a state park ranger husband and his wife struggling to come to terms with their missing teenage son while dealing with a local mystery that questions their relationship and in the end, their grip on reality.

programme.title: Kickboxer: Retaliation
programme.desc: An MMA champion finds himself trapped in a prison in Thailand and is freedom depends on defeating a 400-pound killer in an underground match.

programme.title: The Canton Godfather
programme.desc: A country boy becomes the head of a gang through the purchase of some lucky roses from an old lady.

programme.title: Glorious Days
programme.desc: A group of five girls and one boy becomes Highschool best friends since high school. 23 years later, one of them lay dying in a hospital. She hopes she could see all five of her old friends for the last time.

programme.title: The Lost Tapes
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in the drama of the 'Son of Sam' murders, presented the way the events were covered at the time.

programme.title: Wild Warrior Encounters
programme.desc: In this episode, we witness a desperate mission to save a spooked impala. The intelligence of these anti poaching elephants astounds everyone. And, there is always time for fun tasks.

programme.title: Wild Portugal
programme.desc: Portugal’s coastal waters and the Azores archipelago boast rich ecosystems. Explore the diverse species living in these waters and discover their unique lives in this revealing episode.

programme.title: Jaguarland
programme.desc: Explore a 400 square mile region of the Pantanal where jaguars rule and life follows the seasonal rhythm of the water.

programme.title: Aging In The Wild
programme.desc: In this episode we meet some animal elders who help us understand the psychological mechanisms associated with long life and the positive social value long-lived animals bring to their communities.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: Warren commences his second Food Trail of South Africa in the world famous Kruger National Park and surrounds.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: Johannesburg - the gateway city to exploring South Africa! In this episode Warren indulges in the vibrant international flavours and surrounds of the Sandton neighbourhood, loved by locals and visitors alike.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: The wild northeast coast of South Africa is like nothing you’ve seen. And it’s here Warren will find himself romanced by empty beaches, rugged open oceans, and waterways filled with wild hippopotamus.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: In this episode, Warren experiences the abundance of wildlife here, centering his experience around tracking and finding the elusive and endangered African Wild Dog.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: A true hidden gem of South Africa, the Garden Route is a 200km stretch of coastal highway known for its beguiling diversity and unparalleled spirit of wilderness.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: Warren has arrived into Cape Town. This won’t be your average culinary exploration of a city; Warren has dedicated the entire episode to diving into a specific style of South African cooking known as ‘Cape Malay’.

programme.title: Keanu Reeves: The One And Only
programme.desc: The journey of Keanu Reeves, travel through his youth, his versatile filmography and his many emotinal peaks and troughs to uncover what makes this fantastic icon so celebrated.

programme.title: Whitney: Behind The Voice
programme.desc: A powerful journey into the meteoric rise of Whitney Houston — from her gospel roots to global superstardom — unraveling the tangled relationships, haunting battles with addiction, and the heartbreaking fall of a once-unshakable voice, before her untimely end.

programme.title: Celine Dion: The Heart Goes On
programme.desc: Celine Dion is a household name, synonymous with musical brilliance. Yet, her life has not been untouched by hardship. Join us as we uncover the story behind the legend, her meteoric rise to fame, and the personal trials that shaped her remarkable career.

programme.title: Wildest Survival

programme.desc: Showcasing some of nature’s most incredible animal minds, whose brains demonstrate high intelligence, enabling them to gain advantage of their competition.

programme.desc: What does it take to maintain alpha status as animals grow older? We investigate the responsibilities and challenges that come with being a senior leader of a pack.

programme.title: Taiwan Top 5

programme.desc: Jolie explores top five temples to visit in Taipei. Join her as she learns about the deities worshipped in these temples and what people pray for at each.

programme.title: Around The World With Manu Feildel

programme.title: Alaska: A Year In The Wild
programme.desc: With the arrival of spring, days grow longer and temperatures rise. However, spring in Alaska is short. Animals have just two months to find food and start a family, while avoiding predators.

programme.title: Alaska: A Year In The Wild
programme.desc: Summer has arrived in Alaska.This sets the scene for one of the world's greatest migrations of the Alaskan salmon run.

programme.title: Alaska: A Year In The Wild
programme.desc: Humpback whales return to Alaska's rich feeding grounds and salmon return to spawn in the rivers. The returning salmon however have to negotiate a path past hungry brown bears.

programme.title: Atlantic: A Year In The Wild
programme.desc: In the Atlantic's far north, autumn is the season of gales, cooling temperatures and driving rain. This is when the wildlife must make the final preparations for winter or migrate to warmer climes.

programme.title: Naledi: A Baby Elephant's Tale
programme.desc: Naledi follows the journey of a baby elephant orphaned in a rescue camp, as the man tasked with her survival races to protect an entire species while fighting to save her life.

programme.title: Islands Of Creation

programme.title: Best Eats
programme.desc: Food connects people! A feast for the eyes that spotlights the cuisines of China in a way that’s bound to set the mouths of the whole globe watering!

programme.title: Youthful China
programme.desc: The youth of a country is the future of that country. A series of documentaries focusing on the younger generation of China in which you get to see what they are achieving and what makes them tick!

programme.title: Pixel Collage
programme.desc: A well-crafted collage of selected short documentaries telling stories about all aspects of China! People, technology, culture, and wildlife, all are showcased in Internet-friendly form.

programme.title: Today’s Top Pick
programme.desc: Documentaries in this slot are rebroadcasts of our most-viewed and most popular stories of the season. They feature important social, economic, environmental or other policy-driven issues, affecting lives nationwide or simply in one small village. A broad selection of top productions by Chinese top documentary producers.

programme.title: Humanities and Geography
programme.desc: A strand devoted to the nature and wildlife of China, the people who lived alongside them, and the great and diverse landscapes with which they all contend.

programme.title: Living China
programme.desc: Real life stories told from the personal perspective. Moving, dramatic, sorrows and joys, expressed emphatically and expressed quietly. Watch closely to see and understand the real China as it is lived.

programme.title: Special Edition
programme.desc: Prestige Chinese documentary production, tackling serious subjects with the best cinematography, editing, and all round production values with a unique Chinese perspective.

programme.title: Journeys and Discoveries
programme.desc: A documentary series showcasing the history of China and its people.

programme.desc: A documentary series featuring historical and archaeological exploration.

programme.title: Best Eats
programme.desc: Food connects people! A feast for the eyes that spotlights the cuisines of China in a way that’s bound to set the mouths of the whole globe watering!

programme.title: Youthful China
programme.desc: The youth of a country is the future of that country. A series of documentaries focusing on the younger generation of China in which you get to see what they are achieving and what makes them tick!

programme.title: Pixel Collage
programme.desc: A well-crafted collage of selected short documentaries telling stories about all aspects of China! People, technology, culture, and wildlife, all are showcased in Internet-friendly form.

programme.title: Today’s Top Pick
programme.desc: Documentaries in this slot are rebroadcasts of our most-viewed and most popular stories of the season. They feature important social, economic, environmental or other policy-driven issues, affecting lives nationwide or simply in one small village. A broad selection of top productions by Chinese top documentary producers.

programme.title: Humanities and Geography
programme.desc: A strand devoted to the nature and wildlife of China, the people who lived alongside them, and the great and diverse landscapes with which they all contend.

programme.title: Living China
programme.desc: Real life stories told from the personal perspective. Moving, dramatic, sorrows and joys, expressed emphatically and expressed quietly. Watch closely to see and understand the real China as it is lived.
