programme.title: The Grey Men 2
programme.desc: Triad boss Song seeks to whitewash his image and seize Laika’s mayoral seat amid a regime change. He faces a funding shortfall despite colluding with officials, and gets his right-hand man and enforcer to commit crimes to boost his funds and power. Just as Song believes success is imminent, the dynamics between the three take an unexpected turn…

programme.title: The Kung-fu Instructor
programme.desc: Wong Yang is a famous martial artist who is forced to teach kung fu to the Mong Clan, an evil clan which is trying to destroy its nemesis, the Chow Clan. Chow Ping from the Chow Clan is a student of Wong’s caught in the Mong’s territory and as punishment, the Mong Clan wants to cut off Chow Ping’s limbs. Wong steps in to defend his student.

programme.title: Five Tough Guys
programme.desc: A titular gang of misfits come together to protect a patriotic general from a scheming usurper. To this end, the unlikely heroes act as the general’s escorts on a dangerous journey to a distant British consulate, beset by enemies and sinister Japanese interference along the way.

programme.title: Godfather of Canton
programme.desc: A docker, Lin Si Hai, accidentally saves Commissioner Cheng who then offers him a position in the police force. Lin is smart and soon rises through the ranks through treachery and corruption, before becoming a gangster.

programme.title: The Shaolin Avengers
programme.desc: Hu seeks to avenge his father who is being killed by the White-Browed Hermit and his gang. However, he fails in his attempt and is saved by Fang Shi Yu, a youth from Shaolin whose parents are also killed by the same villains. They learn and master the advanced Shaolin style kung fu, before Fang leads Hu and the Shaolin fellows to fight the enemies.

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Ling Hsiao and Kuan Wang Lung are two guard chiefs working for an old convoy master. Lung is secretly in love with Fang Yen, the master’s granddaughter but Yen is attracted to Ling Hsiao instead. In order to win her back, Lung sets up a trap to steal the convoy and frames Ling Hsiao for it.

programme.title: The Fate of Reunion
programme.desc: Thousands of years ago, Green Snake gained enlightenment under the guidance of Dao Qing and gradually falls for him. However, her devotion to Dao Qing caused him to reincarnate and go through the pains of death. Since then, she sets out to search for the many reincarnations of Dao Qing over hundreds of years to help him reverse the situation…

programme.title: The Shadow Boxer
programme.desc: Skilled shadow Tai Chi boxer Ku Ting hides his skills by working as a construction worker. However, when the thugs assaulted his girlfriend, Ku Ting has no choice but to use his kung fu to show his enemies what it takes to keep justice in line.

programme.title: Fierce Cop
programme.desc: To save his son who has been kidnapped by human traffickers, police officer Zhang relentlessly hunts them down and accidentally finds himself implicated in a major child abduction case. In the process, he teams up with a mysterious lady to crack the international crime syndicate and rescue his son.

programme.title: The Mad Monk
programme.desc: Stephen Chow plays an arrogant god in Heaven who is being punished for his pranks and mistakes. He is sent to Earth and reincarnate as Mad Monk to change the destiny of three misguided souls - a prostitute, a beggar and a villain. The Mad Monk needs to complete the task in three days in order to return to Heaven.

programme.title: The Case of Disappearances
programme.desc: In Misty Village, the adopted son Wen Jie is haunted by a recurring nightmare. He delves into a series of disappearance cases in the village to seek his true identity. As more villagers die mysteriously, belief in the curse of Emperor Jing Lung intensifies. Wen Jie teams up with the security chief to unveil the conspiracy and protect the villagers.

programme.title: Killer Clans
programme.desc: This intriguing wuxia saga is packed with conspiracies, power schemes and sword fights to produce a perfect blend of great action and gripping drama. The movie centres around the struggle for underworld supremacy between two clans, where the line between good and evil is not always that clear-cut.

programme.title: Heaven Sword and Dragon Sabre
programme.desc: In the Yuan Dynasty, martial artists everywhere battle for the Heaven Sword and the Dragon Sabre, as only when these two powerful weapons combine can a secret be revealed to help one become the king of the martial arts world. As Zhang Wu Ji acquires the skills from “Nine Yang Scriptures” by chance, he is also embroiled in this lengthy battle.

programme.title: Come Drink with Me
programme.desc: The brother of the mystery swordswoman "Golden Swallow” is kidnapped. She joins forces with a beggar “Drunken Cat” who is skilled in martial arts to free her brother from a Buddhist monastery run by a corrupt abbot. The film was selected as Hong Kong’s entry for the Best Foreign Language Film at the 39th Academy Awards.

programme.title: Five Shaolin Masters
programme.desc: The Qing court plots to kill all Shaolin disciples by burning down Shaolin Temple. This sudden fire killed almost everyone except for five disciples. To take revenge on the Qing court, the five of them train hard in different fighting styles to become “The Five Shaolin Masters”.

programme.title: Death Duel
programme.desc: Third Master is a renowned swordsman in the martial arts world, but the constant challenges by other swordsmen compel him to fake his death and pursue a secluded life. This does not prevent others from seeking him out to challenge him however, and he is forced to return to fight his way till the end.

programme.title: The Flag of Iron
programme.desc: When super director Chang Cheh found new talent and blood with "The Five Venoms" actors, most of which were trained in the highly acrobatic Chinese opera and well versed with exotic martial arts weapons, this created a new spark for his use of bizarre weapons in his films. The Flag Of Iron is one of 20 movies that he directed featuring the utterly flabbergasting and physically exhausting action bits created by these five dudes. You have the good guys from the righteous clan versus the bad guys from the villainous clan and it's so filled with "don't-blink-or-you-will-miss-something" gags, you will need to watch it over and over again so you can see the things you missed.

programme.title: Boxer Rebellion
programme.desc: The Empress Dowager Cixi believes the Boxers’ claim that they have developed a kung fu that makes them impervious to weapons, thus declaring war against the alliances of eight foreign nations. The lack of weapons and good leadership in the Ching government allows the Eight Nation Alliances to take down Beijing.

programme.title: The Myth
programme.desc: An archaeologist Jack, and a scientist William, stumble upon ancient Qin Dynasty artifacts that lead them to the mausoleum and mysteriously connects Jack to his past life as a warrior in ancient China, starting their mythical journey.

programme.title: Return of the Sentimental Swordsman
programme.desc: One of Shaw Studio’s highest grossing movies ever, this is the story of Li Chin Huan, the renowned, charming and sentimental swordsman who must fight many opponents, including an evil Clan Chief, for a place in the martial arts world.

programme.title: Masked Avengers
programme.desc: A mysterious new gang, the Masked Avengers, is slaughtering the martial world's greatest heroes. To stop them, three fearless fighters must track down the gang's hidden lair in Jingyang Town and put an end to their reign of terror.

programme.title: The Condemned
programme.desc: Feng, a homeless man, is wrongly accused of robbery and subsequently arrested and imprisoned. The actual bandit bribes fellow inmate Yang, a pickpocket, to kill Feng. Aware of Feng's innocence, Yang resolves to help him escape from prison. However, their escape attempt goes awry, and both find themselves facing the grim reality of death row.

programme.title: Brothers Five
programme.desc: The five Kao brothers, separated since birth, are unaware that the master of Teng Lung Manor has killed their father. All five however, vow to defeat the vicious gangsters at the manor due to their bullying ways. After reuniting and with much discipline and hard work, the Kaos are prepared to face Lung and his gang.

programme.title: Song of the Assassins
programme.desc: A young assassin is assigned his first mission while secretly investigating the cause of his family’s massacre years ago. During the mission, he finds himself entangled in a political conspiracy that has been planned for years and must use his skills as an assassin to face whatever comes his way.

programme.title: Reincarnated Swordsman
programme.desc: A Wu Dang disciple Fu, kills the chief of Wu Dang Clan and frames it on the chief’s illegitimate child, Yun. Fu then proclaims himself the new chief and orders the killing of Yun, who vows to avenge his father’s death and learns the invincible silkworm martial arts style in order to defeat Fu.

programme.title: Behind the Yellow Line
programme.desc: A fresh graduate, Paul, strikes up an acquaintance with a pretty young girl, Monica, on the metro. Monica is involved in a love affair with a married man while Paul is also pursued by a rich girl. When Paul vows his true love for Monica, she suggests playing hide-and-seek with him in the metro to decide if they are fated to be together.

programme.title: Duel Of Fist
programme.desc: Fan Ke discovers at his father’s deathbed that he has a half-brother, Wenlie, in Thailand. He goes to find Wenlie, who became a boxer to support his sick mother. Following their encounter, the two got involved in the underworld of boxing match gambling.

programme.title: Five Superfighters
programme.desc: A kung fu master and his three students lost everything after they are floored by a bully. To take revenge, the students find ways to learn from other kung fu masters and come back six months later to have a rematch with the bully on their master’s birthday.

programme.title: Shaolin
programme.desc: Set in the Warlord Era, General Hou is betrayed by his subordinate Cao Man and they find themselves on opposing sides as the war escalates. The ultimate battle ensues when Cao Man’s army is set to besiege the peaceful Shaolin Temple. General Hou, together with the Shaolin monks, are forced to take up arms to protect the beloved temple.

programme.title: The Lychee Road
programme.desc: A single lychee sparks a Tang Dynasty “Mission Impossible”! Low-ranking official Li Shan De must deliver it a thousand miles in three days to satisfy a consort’s craving. Racing against time, he encounters obstacles and absurd demands, turning the journey into a satirical adventure filled with tension and unexpected twists.

programme.title: Life Must Go On
programme.desc: When the “midnight gymnasium” programme for wayward teenage girls is at funding risk, social worker Yanki puts together a dodgeball team to compete in a match and save it. With an ex-star athlete John as the coach, the girls realize they must face their problems and overcome their challenges instead of dodging them. Can they finally win the match?

programme.title: The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Wang's odd behaviour and quirky ideas make him a social outcast. His teenage nephew Zhou, who is ashamed of his stutter, becomes Wang's only friend. Together, these misfits challenge traditional family expectations and social misunderstandings, supporting and inspiring each other as they seek their own paths in life.

programme.title: Mama's Affair
programme.desc: Former talent manager Mei Fung stays home to take care of her husband and son after retirement. She decides to re-enter the entertainment business to find her value in life, and successfully transforms a local restaurant delivery boy, Fong Ching, into a young pop idol. This makes her teenage son, Jonathan, intensely jealous of Fong Ching.

programme.title: Shaolin Martial Arts
programme.desc: The Qing government assigns fighters to destroy Shaolin Temple and kill all the disciples, but two of them successfully escaped. They train under different masters and learn the Wing Chun and Hung Quan styles respectively, finally killing the fighters and taking revenge for the death of their fellow disciples.

programme.title: Executioners From Shaolin
programme.desc: The White-Browed Priest supports the brutal Qing government, burning down Shaolin Temple and hunting its disciples. Shaolin’s Hung falls in love with Fang while escaping the hunt and the couple have a son before Hung is killed by the Priest. To avenge his father, Hung’s son creates a new form of martial art combining his parents’ kung fu styles.

programme.title: Face to Face
programme.desc: Tamotsu dies in a skiing accident and his roommate Yoshio marries his wife as well as inherits his entire fortune. At Tamotsu's funeral, Yoshio sees a badly disfigured old man and that is only the beginning of an evil downfall for him…

programme.title: Opium And The Kung-Fu Master
programme.desc: Tie Qiao San, head of the Ten Guangdong Tigers, is an honourable master with many disciples. As opium becomes popular among the nobles, Tie starts taking it and gradually harms his body. When an opium house’s owner defeats Tie in a fight and he is only saved from being killed by his disciple, Tie vows to quit opium and get back on his feet.

programme.title: Pass and Goal
programme.desc: After losing everything, a businesswoman starts over in Sham Shui Po, forming a kids’ football team to take on an elite squad. As she rebuilds her life, she inspires her players to believe in themselves and fight against the odds. Together, they strive to rewrite their first half with a second chance at victory and hope.

programme.title: Shaolin Mantis
programme.desc: The Emperor orders Feng to find proofs of Master Tian’s rebellion in his house. Feng falls in love with Tian’s granddaughter and marries her. When he finds the proofs and tries to leave with her, his wife is killed in the fight against Tian. Feng creates the mantis-style martial arts and vows to avenge her death.

programme.title: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Amid the recession caused by the pandemic, debt-ridden wedding planner, Sheng, finds a lifeline as he transitions into a funeral planner. His unconventional approach leads to unexpected success, and his attitude toward his career and life is transformed after being inspired by the respected Master Wen.

programme.title: No One Like Me
programme.desc: Yang Qian Huan, the third disciple of the Imperial Astronomer, was once a golden boy. However, since the birth of Xu Qi An, his glory has waned. His relentless pursuit cannot defy a merciless truth: all has been foretold. Yet rising from his downfall, Yang defiantly forges his own path, refusing to bow to fate.

programme.title: Brotherhood
programme.desc: Liu serves his triad society loyally and tries to live a respectable life, but over time his good intentions lead him to an all-out gang war with a startling conclusion.

programme.title: Peg O' My Heart
programme.desc: Psychiatrist Dr. Man begins treating night-shift taxi driver Choi, who is afraid to sleep and can no longer distinguish dreams from reality. During therapy, Dr. Man becomes haunted by his own disturbing and perplexing dreams. Are these night terrors the result of repressed memories, or the price of uncovering the ghosts hidden in Choi’s past?

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Chatroom Japan
programme.desc: Chatroom Japan puts a spotlight on our diverse international community. We report on the issues, speak to those involved, and get a fresh look at what it's like to live in Japan.

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: The entire Earth is affected by climate change, occurring with a greater speed and scale than ever before. This program uses scientific data and the latest findings to raise awareness on its impact.

programme.title: Design Museum Japan
programme.desc: Hokkaido / Takeya Takayuki (model maker) Fishing boats in the herring industry-which thrived here until the 1950s-featured swirling decorations that made a big impression on Takeya, a Hokkaido native.

programme.title: The Factory Wonders
programme.desc: A selection of acclaimed programs from NHK's domestic channels dubbed into English.

programme.title: Time-lapse Japan
programme.desc: Hagi, a World Heritage site of ten described as an "open-air museum," is lined with merchant and samurai houses and retains much of its 17th-century townscape. Soak in the atmosphere, in time-lapse.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: The Seasons of Yamato
programme.desc: A series of poetic videos by Koichi Hozan, a videographer living in Nara, in collaboration with a pianist, Mine Kawakami, for which she plays exclusive pieces, makes you experience each seasons.

programme.title: Bosai
programme.desc: Be earthquake-ready! Learn survival tips for quakes and when you're trapped under rubble. You'll want to watch this before your next trip to Japan.

programme.title: Magical Japanese
programme.desc: The Japanese language is rich in words and expressions influenced by nature, history, and culture. This episode looks at words related to kaku, or "to write." Explore the unique culture behind them.

programme.title: Easy Japanese
programme.desc: #28 May I take photos here? / When seeking permission to do something, change the end of a verb to "te" style. For example, "toru" (take) becomes "totte." Then add "mo ii desu ka."

programme.title: Culture Crossroads
programme.desc: Efforts to save children have evolved in a unique way, energizing people who provide services. We introduce a splendid international example of such an initiative in Matsuyama, Ehime Prefecture.

programme.title: Hello!NHK World Japan
programme.desc: In March, NHK WORLD-JAPAN launched a new online hub for BOSAI-preparing for disaster. It has pages, apps and guides, in multiple languages. We also see programs about June's theme: Mount Fuji.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Seasoning the Seasons
programme.desc: This program visits places across Japan to introduce the charms of their local daily life and festivals fostered by the nation's long history.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Darwin's Amazing Animals
programme.desc: We all crave attention but one bird goes the extra mile to rise above the flock. Come with us to South America's smallest country Suriname to catch the main attraction: the Guianan Cock of the Rock!

programme.title: Time-lapse Journey
programme.desc: Seto Inland Sea is the largest body of water of its kind in Japan. See the sights of the Great Seto Bridge and the shallow coastal waters through time-lapse photography.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Hometown Stories
programme.desc: Stories about people, stories about life. Intimate portraits of people from around Japan, each leading diverse lives while enriching lives of others.

programme.title: Satoyama Kitchen Spring #3
programme.desc: At the Satoyama Kitchen guesthouse in Hida Takayama, chef Nobuko, her cameraman husband Makoto and their cat Tama take us on a tasty journey of local cuisine served with a side of seasonal scenery.

programme.desc: NEWSROOM TOKYO dives deeper into the day's news with insight and analysis, from the perspective of Japan and the rest of Asia. We put a spotlight on what you need to know to understand the issues.

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: In 2025, Yasuda Kan won the Isamu Noguchi Award, given to artists who embody a spirit of innovation, global consciousness, and commitment to cultural exchange. He talks about the power of sculpture.

programme.title: Dive in Tokyo
programme.desc: Kasai is a bayside town in eastern Tokyo bounded by two large rivers. Join us as we trace its history as a hub of water transport, go river fishing, and get to know the local Indian community.

programme.title: Smallville S1 21
programme.desc: As a massive tornado approaches the unsuspecting Smallville, Clark finds a missing piece of the spaceship that carried him to Earth.

programme.title: Hack My Life S2 11
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin explore hacks for getting special treatment at a restaurant, and Broke Ass Bob finds hacks to save you money. Plus, become your very own sushi chef.

programme.title: Hack My Life S2 12
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin discover the best ways to inflate a basketball, explore the birth of the fanny pack, and end up with a fruity explosion. Plus, Pitchman uncovers the best ways to unclog drains, pit cherries, and grate cheese.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 07
programme.desc: Michael and his fellow employees debate the authenticity of a giant lizard and find a game with a very specific target audience. Then at the diner, he adds some spice to lunch time and gives patrons the chills while demonstrating a new way to cool soup. Finally at the furniture store, Michael shows his coworker that impossible things can happen in the blink of an eye.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 08
programme.desc: In this special crossover event, the Impractical Jokers help Michael stun coffee bar customers - but soon discover the joke is on them! Plus, Michael's woodland creatures display fantastic hidden abilities.

programme.title: Container Wars S3 6
programme.desc: The auction turns into a circus when four containers bound for Russia's Winter Games miss the boat. A waterlogged container piques everyone's interest, but can anything inside be salvaged? Plus, a Major League Baseball player gives Mo & Ty the lowdown on a state-of-the art piece of gym equipment

programme.title: Container Wars S3 7
programme.desc: The Israelis hang ten on a sweet beach can, but one surprise item may send them off the lot in search of major dollars. Plus, Jason strikes on a container full of wood and weird gear, but will his investment land him in the gutter? And later, a mystery door may check one team into a big loss.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 4
programme.desc: Our buyers throw down to score a locker packed with rare movie memorabilia. Then, Papa Bear and T-Money each scoop up low-grade bins, but when they each start to sift through their individual messes, one of them finds a childhood dream-come-true. Andlater, the day's final auction sparks an intense bidding war, but when one of our buyers shoots the moon on his bid, it leaves everyone else wondering exactly where all of this cash is coming from.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S7 04
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q hit the supermarket to mess with shoppers in an epic game of Hide-and-Sneak, the guys draw straws at a BBQ joint, and tonight's loser gets a bad case of stage fright while giving the performance of his life.

programme.title: Cry Macho
programme.desc: A former rodeo star and washed-up horse breeder goes on a redemptive journey to Mexico to retrieve his ex-boss' son in this moving drama.

programme.title: The Assassination of Jesse James By the Coward Robert Ford
programme.desc: International superstar Brad Pitt (Troy) stars as legendary outlaw Jesse James in this Western drama based on Ron Hansen's best-selling novel The Assassination Of Jesse James By The Coward Robert Ford. A charismatic, superstitious and moody man, Jesse James (Pitt) presides over a ragtag gang of outlaws who fear his quick temper and even quicker shooting ability. Young Robert Ford (Casey Affleck - Ocean's Twelve) worships Jesse and joins the James Gang, only to become resentful of his hero. Intent on taking Jesse's place, the young upstart hatches a plan to kill the fastest gun in the West. But after gunning Jesse James down, Robert Ford lives out the rest of his days tormented by the cold-blooded killing of his former mentor.

programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin game the system by testing the most effective hacks for buying a used car-and knocking hundreds of dollars off in the process! Plus, the newest Hack Master reveals a mind-blowing technique for taking out the trash.

programme.title: Jersey Boys
programme.desc: From Oscar?winning director Clint Eastwood (Million Dollar Baby, Unforgiven) comes the big-screen adaptation of the Tony Award-winning musical. JERSEY BOYS tells the story of four young men from the wrong side of the tracks in New Jersey who came together to form the legendary 1960s rock group The Four Seasons. John Lloyd Young reprises his Tony-winning role of legendary lead singer Frankie Valli, alongside Erich Bergen as the group's co-writer Bob Gaudio. The story of their trials and triumphsare accompanied by the songs that influenced a generation, including "Sherry," Big Girls Don't Cry," Walk Like a Man," and many more --classic hits that are now being embraced by a new generation of fans through the musical that's been running on Broadway for more than eight years.

programme.title: Getaway
programme.desc: The chase is on. Academy Award nominee Ethan Hawke (Training Day) stars in this gritty, high-octane action thriller alongside actress/music sensation Selena Gomez and Oscar winner Jon Voight (Coming Home). Hawke stars as a former racecar driver, working against the clock and forced into a dangerous mission behind the wheel. Desperately trying to save the life of his kidnapped wife, he commandeers a fast car and its unwitting owner (Gomez), taking them on a high-speed race against time at the command of the unseen mysterious assailant (Voight) holding his wife hostage and watching his every move. To save his wife, he took the job. To keep her alive, he'll take control.

programme.title: Inkheart
programme.desc: What if every time you read aloud, the story came to life? Based on Cornelia Funke's bestselling children's novel, this timeless tale of imagination and adventure centers on a young girl whose father (The Mummy's Brendan Fraser) has a secret ability to bring characters from books to life when he reads them aloud. But when a ruthless villain (The Lord of the Rings' Andy Serkis) from a rare children's fable kidnaps Meggie's father to bring others out of the boundaries of fiction, she and a disparate group of friends both real and magic embark on the kind of adventure she has only read about in books to save him and set things right. Also starring The Da Vinci Code's Paul Bettany and Oscar winners Helen Mirren and Jim Broadbent, 'Inkheart' makes all the mystery, all the danger, and all the adventure jump off the page!

programme.title: Asia First

programme.title: Green Wood Robbery
programme.desc: Set in the early years of the Republic of China, the wealthy Kang family is brutally murdered, and their young daughter —the sole witness— mysteriously disappears. For decades, the haunting of the Kang house on Green Wood Lane lingers. As the truth behind the tragedy unfolds, motives of revenge and death intertwine in this chilling mystery.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: The Ones You Didn't Burn
programme.desc: After their father's death, Nathan and his sister return to their family home to prepare it for sale. While there, Nathan discovers that the land was stolen from the ancestors of two women accused of witchcraft. As he delves deeper, he uncovers an occult conspiracy linked to their father's death which now threatens them both.

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: A taxi driver who is constantly judging others by his own standards, also reads into their every move and sets out to help ‘victims’ in his own way. When a woman he likes seems to be bullied by her son, he goes about setting things right for her, even resorting to turning himself into a cold-blooded serial killer…

programme.title: Whisper of Silent Body
programme.desc: Renowned as the "corpse whisperer," forensic pathologist Qin Ming uncovers vital clues from the corpses. During a homicide investigation, he unravels a murder case sixteen years ago in the snowy mountain with his assistant and a detective. Together, they unveil the secrets of the mysterious homicide.

programme.title: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: Jas's peaceful countryside getaway with her sister Laura is shattered when a group of drifters attacks them. After Laura is brutally killed, Jas discovers her lifeless body at their rented cabin. Consumed by grief and fury, she vows to hunt down the gang and take vengeance on her sister's murderer.

programme.title: Green Wood Robbery
programme.desc: Set in the early years of the Republic of China, the wealthy Kang family is brutally murdered, and their young daughter —the sole witness— mysteriously disappears. For decades, the haunting of the Kang house on Green Wood Lane lingers. As the truth behind the tragedy unfolds, motives of revenge and death intertwine in this chilling mystery.

During a homicide investigation, he unravels a murder case sixteen years ago in the snowy mountain with his assistant and a detective. Together, they unveil the secrets of the mysterious homicide.

programme.title: Malee
programme.desc: When four best friends reunite for a funeral at an ancient estate, a reckless act with a cursed Manohra dancer's headdress awakens a vengeful spirit that begins to haunt and follow them relentlessly. As paranormal phenomena escalate, they are forced to confront the estate's dark secrets in a desperate struggle for survival.

programme.title: Night at the Eagle Inn
programme.desc: A pair of fraternal twins spend a terrifying night in a remote inn to investigate the last known whereabouts of their father who mysteriously disappeared the night they were born. As they dive deeper, the property's dark secrets ensnare them in a hellish labyrinth which they must escape before dawn.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Artiste Yin Qing enters Hell's Gate through a supernatural TV show and reunites with her late friend Mei Qi. At Mei Qi's gravesite, Yin Qing encounters Mei Qi's husband, Dong Sheng, and a series of mysterious incidents unfold. She then brings Dong Sheng onto the show, where Mei Qi exposes his infidelity and reveals the conspiracy behind her death.

programme.title: Behave
programme.desc: Following the death of their friend, a group of young adults travels to a villa on the outskirts of London that contains a deep mystery. As unsettling events escalate during their luxurious stay, they must unravel the villa’s dark secrets.

programme.title: Detrimental
programme.desc: You Ji Ren is a blind man who works at a factory on an outlying island. When the factory is cut off from the outside world by a hurricane one day, a monster appears and turns whoever sees it into black shadows. As You cannot see the monster, he is able to help his other co-workers escape safely and fight to kill the monster.

programme.title: Chop Chop
programme.desc: A young couple's tranquility is shattered by a psychotic serial killer one quiet evening. Their battle for survival reveals hidden truths, entangling them unwittingly with the criminal underworld.

programme.title: Chop Chop
programme.desc: A young couple's tranquility is shattered by a psychotic serial killer one quiet evening. Their battle for survival reveals hidden truths, entangling them unwittingly with the criminal underworld.

programme.title: Mid-night Two
programme.desc: Yi Cheng and his friends venture into a haunted mountain that hides an ancient corpse and an eternal ghostly flame. No one who enters the mountain ever returns and at 2:30 AM, Yi Cheng’s friends vanish one by one. While searching for them in the eerie forest, Yi Cheng enters a realm of infinite reincarnation, facing a series of terrifying events…

programme.title: Guns of Eden
programme.desc: During a camping trip deep in the mountains, former Buffalo cop Megan and her friends stumble upon the local sheriff unlawfully executing a drug trafficker. Spotted and marked for death, they find every escape route sealed. To cover up his crime, the sheriff summons an armed militia to hunt them down—triggering a deadly chase with no way out.

programme.title: Jealousy
programme.desc: Model Min is admitted to a hospital, but mysteriously falls to her death at night. Rumour has it that the hospital is haunted. Subsequently, Min's photographer begins receiving eerie phone calls, the writer loses consciousness in a bizarre car accident, and her friend mysteriously disappears…

programme.title: The Revenge
programme.desc: Ruo Wei returns to her childhood home with two best friends, and reunites with her cousin who has always lived there. While they plan to enjoy their trip, they are constantly haunted by paranormal events, ending up in a terrifying experience with unexpected outcome.

programme.title: The Windmill Massacre
programme.desc: Jennifer joins a tour to explore the renowned windmills of the Netherlands. As their tour coach breaks down on the way, they seek refuge in a creepy shed near a sinister windmill with a dark history. When some tour members suddenly disappear, Jennifer discovers a shared secret among them, linking their fates in a chilling revelation.

programme.title: 7ujuh
programme.desc: 7 friends go on a road trip to a remote bungalow run by a village head and his daughter Suri. They host a party and ask Suri to help. Things spiral out of control and Suri is raped. Before killing herself, she curses them to be haunted in their dreams. As the friends are killed off one by one, they must break the curse to escape their deadly fate.

programme.title: Never Leave
programme.desc: Strange incidents keep happening in Lin Yue's house after a car accident: her sister cannot see the images of her family members in the mirror; her father is peeping at night; and there is the sound of marbles from the attic every day at dawn. Following the sound to the attic, Lin Yue finds her own death portrait as she opens the door...

programme.title: Waning Moon
programme.desc: Nuanchan is a famous and highly respected spiritual medium in a rural village in Thailand. She wants to train her niece, Ploy, to succeed her and Ploy needs to remain a virgin. When Ploy falls in love with her childhood friend Tul, their lives are in danger as the secret of the spiritual world is being unveiled.

programme.title: Get in the Dark
programme.desc: A reporter hears three horror stories when investigating a case of the paper doll spirit 20 years ago. Miss Qiao had died in vain then, and her butler paid a paper craftsman to make a paper doll to be buried with her. Miss Qiao’s spirit is revived to take revenge when the doll’s eyes are drawn, and a series of horrible events begins to happen...

programme.title: The Getaway
programme.desc: Three KOLs embark on a live-streaming trip to a remote island. However, they are deceived by a mysterious old woman who traps them, intending to find brides for her disabled grandsons. As they realise they have been captured, they must race against time to escape this nightmare island.

programme.title: 7ujuh
programme.desc: 7 friends go on a road trip to a remote bungalow run by a village head and his daughter Suri. They host a party and ask Suri to help. Things spiral out of control and Suri is raped. Before killing herself, she curses them to be haunted in their dreams. As the friends are killed off one by one, they must break the curse to escape their deadly fate.

programme.title: Never Leave

Following the sound to the attic, Lin Yue finds her own death portrait as she opens the door...

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape
programme.desc: ATF Special Agents Dobyns and Kilday put their best feet forward only to have their lives put on the line. Once the investigation wraps, will they become targets for revenge?

programme.title: Taking The Stand (S3)
programme.desc: In 2006, Ken Juedes was found dead by his wife, Cindy Shulz-Juedes. For 13 years the case went cold until investigators linked her to the murder.

programme.title: Beyond The Headlines: The Series
programme.desc: Heartbreaking accounts of families torn apart by crime. Ashley Wallace, who was almost killed by her own mother, Jenny Carrieri, whose search for her sister's murderer consumed her life.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Dead West
programme.desc: In 1987 Carol Murphy, 28, is found by hikers slain in a wooded area of Lefthand Canyon, CO. Police uncover a turbulent love life and plenty of suspects in this Western enclave.

programme.title: Ozark Law (S1)
programme.desc: As summer rolls on, the police officers try to keep the Lake of the Ozarks community safe. Detective Sergeant Mark Kordula gets called to the aid of a bloodied and concussed bar patron lying in the road.

programme.title: Sleeping With A Killer (S2)
programme.desc: In an affluent Washington town, a teenage heartbreak spirals into obsession, culminating in a deadly house-party shooting that exposes how jealousy can turn lethal.

programme.title: First Blood (S1)
programme.desc: Charming and smart, Henry tried to hide his dark side, fuelled by years of abuse and twisted fantasies, until his first murder. Then, bad Henry took over.

programme.title: City Confidential (S9)
programme.desc: The quiet suburb of Haddon Township is turned upside down when a toddler goes missing. Residents band together to search local streets and help detectives reveal an unlikely murderer.

programme.title: Partners In Crime (S1)
programme.desc: Forensic dentist Dr Carl Leung recounts his work with the Hong Kong Police on the 'Hello Kitty Murder' and helping to solve a killing spree.

programme.title: Partners In Crime (S1)
programme.desc: From identifying body parts to murder disguised as suicide, Taiwan's veteran forensic pathologist unravels these vicious lies.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape
programme.desc: ATF Special Agents Dobyns and Kilday put their best feet forward only to have their lives put on the line. Once the investigation wraps, will they become targets for revenge?

programme.title: Cleansing Kalijodo
programme.desc: Kalijodo is a gang-controlled slum. When a gang leader's brother is killed, the slum erupts into violence and it is up to the new captain to restore order and break the gangs' hold on the district.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S1)
programme.desc: A woman struggles to deal with her husband's health issues and gets a DWI, while a father having too much fun draws attention to himself resulting in a gun possession charge.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: Detectives interrogate a woman accused of killing a lottery winner for his $30,000,000 prize; special agents press an ex-con about a missing 5-year-old girl and her dead babysitter; and more.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: A 92-year-old woman tells investigators why she shot and killed her 72-year-old son; a detective tells a suspect that the man he’s accused of stabbing has died at the hospital; and more.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died
programme.desc: After a storm hits Warwick Cove, RI, a boat dragging its anchor appears in the harbour with a decomposed corpse onboard. Pathologist Dr. Priya Banerjee must identify the John Doe and determine how he died.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks
programme.desc: When 14-year-old Nacole Smith is brutally murdered in 1995 on a wooded path in Atlanta, the police and community rally around her mother as she seeks justice.

programme.title: Hoarders (S14)
programme.desc: Jim has been a collector from a very young age but some of the tragedies in his life have compounded Jim's hoarding behavior.

programme.title: Crime In Progress
programme.desc: During a routine traffic stop in New Mexico, an officer’s radio falls silent, triggering a frantic manhunt caught entirely on body cam.

programme.title: Murder In The 21st
programme.desc: A young, pregnant woman is found dead of an apparent suicide in Saginaw, MI, but her family and friends don't believe it. The police discover a shocking secret they never saw coming.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S6)
programme.desc: A 68-year-old father shoots his daughter's boyfriend when the couple arrives at the family home. Believing his daughter is trapped in an abusive relationship, he fires three shots.

programme.title: Hoarders (S14)
programme.desc: Jim has been a collector from a very young age but some of the tragedies in his life have compounded Jim's hoarding behavior.

programme.title: Crime In Progress
programme.desc: During a routine traffic stop in New Mexico, an officer’s radio falls silent, triggering a frantic manhunt caught entirely on body cam.

programme.title: Murder In The 21st
programme.desc: A young, pregnant woman is found dead of an apparent suicide in Saginaw, MI, but her family and friends don't believe it. The police discover a shocking secret they never saw coming.

programme.title: Cleansing Kalijodo
programme.desc: Kalijodo is a gang-controlled slum. When a gang leader's brother is killed, the slum erupts into violence and it is up to the new captain to restore order and break the gangs' hold on the district.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S1)
programme.desc: A woman struggles to deal with her husband's health issues and gets a DWI, while a father having too much fun draws attention to himself resulting in a gun possession charge.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: Detectives interrogate a woman accused of killing a lottery winner for his $30,000,000 prize; special agents press an ex-con about a missing 5-year-old girl and her dead babysitter; and more.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: A 92-year-old woman tells investigators why she shot and killed her 72-year-old son; a detective tells a suspect that the man he’s accused of stabbing has died at the hospital; and more.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died
programme.desc: After a storm hits Warwick Cove, RI, a boat dragging its anchor appears in the harbour with a decomposed corpse onboard. Pathologist Dr. Priya Banerjee must identify the John Doe and determine how he died.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks
programme.desc: When 14-year-old Nacole Smith is brutally murdered in 1995 on a wooded path in Atlanta, the police and community rally around her mother as she seeks justice.

programme.title: Spellbound: Crimes Of The Mind
programme.desc: In Malaysia, crimes involving 'pukau' have led to robbery, fraud and even rape. But why were the victims so powerless? Could black magic be involved?

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: After a man and a woman are found shot, investigators struggle to find clues to catch the killer until a deputy locates the victim's car filled with guns, silencers, and a mysterious man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: When an otherwise healthy woman is admitted to the hospital with sudden organ failure, an anonymous tip leads authorities to investigate a pattern of deaths in her family and a shocking prime suspect.

programme.title: The Life & Murder Of Nicole Brown Simpson
programme.desc: 18-year-old Nicole Brown meets 30-year-old OJ Simpson while working as a hostess, sparking a whirlwind romance. Despite appearing as the perfect wife and mother, Nicole endures OJ's abuse in private.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: Nia Wilson and her two sisters decided to take public transportation back home. But just minutes after texting their father, the sisters were brutally targeted at a train station.

programme.title: Women On Death Row
programme.desc: Kerry Lyn Dalton was sentenced to death for the torture and murder of Irene "Melanie" May. And because Melanie was a meth addict with no fixed address, police did little to investigate her disappearance.

programme.title: Women On Death Row
programme.desc: Melissa Lucio was sentenced to death for the murder of her two-year-old daughter, Mariah, and in January 2022 she was given an official execution date of April 27, 2022.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers (S9)
programme.desc: During Alaska’s summer solstice, Alaska State Troopers confront a fleeing suspect, defuse an armed barricade and investigate arson near the Arctic Circle.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S1)
programme.desc: A man is arrested for driving his golf cart while intoxicated and refuses a breathalyser test. A young man with LSD and hashish learns the hard way that hanging with underage girls is a very bad idea.

programme.title: Drug Runner Lover
programme.desc: After investigating a drug smuggler for years, police finally receive information that leads to his arrest but he refuses to talk. Police have just 8 hours to identify, locate and arrest the entire ring.

programme.title: Murder At The Motel
programme.desc: January 5, 2016, Baltimore, MD. Police officers respond to a report of a deceased man found at the Deluxe Plaza Motel in Northeast Baltimore.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou
programme.desc: The town of Alexandria, Louisiana, is rocked when the body of Courtney Coco, 19, is found dumped 200 miles from home in Winnie, Texas.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: A grieving father attacks his 3-year-old son's killer in court; a judge screams expletives at a disruptive member of the gallery; a wheelchair-ridden defendant runs for it before entering court; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: A defendant announces college baseball scores during his murder trial; a man facing drug charges gets caught smoking marijuana in the virtual courtroom; a domestic violence suspect threatens a judge.

programme.title: First Blood (S1)
programme.desc: Richard Ramirez terrorised Southern California in the mid-1980s, and anyone could be a target. Growing up yearning for a father figure, he found mentorship with his sadistic cousin.

programme.title: Ozark Law (S1)
programme.desc: The action picks up both on the water and off as one of the summer's biggest events descends upon the Lake of the Ozarks: The Shootout powerboat races.

programme.title: After The First 48 (S16)
programme.desc: When an unidentified woman is found dead outside a Tulsa home, detectives must sift through murky details to figure out who she is and what happened to her.

programme.title: The First 48 (S25)
programme.desc: In Tulsa, Det. White needs a former student to tell the truth about a shooting at an apartment complex. In Gwinnett, a man is shot in front of his friend as a robbery takes a deadly turn.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26)
programme.desc: In Mobile, a brazen gunman shoots another man in front of gas station security cameras, and in Gwinnett County, detectives race to identify a woman shot on the side of the road and track down her killer.

programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What it's all about: the guests take an in-depth look at a key issue. Increased focus on Francophone cultural news, with dedicated sequences. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: L'Invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Strip-Tease
programme.desc: Programme synopsis: Fire and brimstone (1987) Michel Galloo, an exorcist, brandishes his crucifix wherever it's required; The caravan rolls by (1986) A missing wife, a photo novel, the death of a dog, a caravan... it all happens on holiday in the Ardennes.

programme.title: Strip-Tease
programme.desc: Programme synopsis: No ticket to ride (1990) Tracking down fare-dodgers, some very aggressive, on public transport in Brussels; Shameless (1997) Free food, free drink... How to gatecrash society parties.

programme.title: Littoral
programme.desc: For the last fifteen years, Charles Braine has been practising sustainable fishing using gentle techniques, such as pole and line, on an energy-efficient boat. An activist, he has also set up an association for seafood products, as well as defending his profession before MEPs.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Interieurs
programme.desc: Anne-Catherine Verwaerde visits Emmanuel in the Landes and Tiphaine in the North to admire the renovations carried out in their homes.

programme.title: Guides D'Aventures
programme.desc: In the USA, mountain bike guide Philippe Turbide welcomes Nadine and Francois. The two experienced cyclists dream of testing themselves on the trails of the Moab Desert, including the Porcupine Rim, described as one of the most beautiful American trails, and tackling the steep slopes of Navajo Rocks.

programme.title: 6H Info
programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: Information and good humour, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Chef Pays
programme.desc: Chef Leila Albert prepares vegetable gyozas with chili.

programme.title: Slam
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Interieurs
programme.desc: Anne-Catherine Verwaerde visits Emmanuel in the Landes and Tiphaine in the North to admire the renovations carried out in their homes.

programme.title: Littoral
programme.desc: For the last fifteen years, Charles Braine has been practising sustainable fishing using gentle techniques, such as pole and line, on an energy-efficient boat. An activist, he has also set up an association for seafood products, as well as defending his profession before MEPs.

programme.title: Edmond Et Lucy
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: Pompon Ours
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Pompon Ours
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Il etait Une Fois... Ces Droles D'Objets
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: 1001 Mondes Antiques
programme.desc: Braillard, Colombe and Lablatte have discovered a way of travelling back through ancient eras and civilisations. They embark on a journey back in time, passing through popular civilisations such as ancient Egypt and Greece, as well as sub-Saharan Africa, the Middle East and Mesopotamia.

programme.title: Conte-Nous !
programme.desc: A long, long time ago, in the heart of the African savannah, animals still had the gift of speech. It was also a time of story-telling, of tales that had so much to teach us, where the main character was a lion, a hyena, a leopard or a frog.

programme.title: Quasimodo
programme.desc: Paris, 1483. 16-year-old Quasimodo is a hunchbacked orphan. One day, the gypsy Esmeralda, with whom he is in love, finds herself in trouble. He sacrifices himself to save her and ends up in prison. And so begins a long series of adventures...

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Cosy, Le Mag Deco
programme.desc: Caroline Boeglin goes in search of astonishing lodgings. She shares her love of finding objects in antique markets, her DIY ideas and her interior design touch that transforms a room. Decoration and renovation are the key words for her discoveries.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Passe-Moi Les Jumelles
programme.desc: Join Matthieu Fournier as he follows windsurfing champion Pauline Katz, then returns to Switzerland to showcase the breathtaking work of Francois Staub, a high-end cabinetmaker driven by freedom.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Poulets Grilles
programme.desc: Who killed Sofia Popova, the cleaning lady at the Leroy family hotel? The 4th brigade is determined to prove its effectiveness in this investigation. But when a second murder occurs, the main suspect turns out to be Eva. Time is running out to prove her innocence and unmask the killer.

programme.title: Le Spectacle De La Fete Du Canada 2026
programme.desc: At LeBreton Flats Park in Ottawa, before several thousand people, the Canada Day show brings together, as every year, many talented artists for an exceptional concert.

programme.title: Sous Le Tapis
programme.desc: Odile and Jean are getting ready to host their children and grandchildren at their house in the country for Odile's birthday. When Jean suddenly dies of cardiac arrest, Odile panics and hides the body under the bed...

programme.title: Pour Toi Flora
programme.desc: Remi Dumont, an indigenous boarding school survivor in search of healing and redemption wants to tell his story.

programme.title: Pour Toi Flora
programme.desc: New revelations turn Julianne's life upside down.

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: The House of Christian Dior launches its 4th Women at Dior mentoring programme. All you ever wanted to know about the origins of the saying ''Rendez-vous A Midi Petante'' (rendezvous bang on midday). Rouvenat: the renaissance of a great name in French jewellery. How to associate burgundy in men's fashion.

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What it's all about: the guests take an in-depth look at a key issue. programme.title: En Marge Du Monde
programme.desc: As a child Juan Manuel Cifuentes Piñero wanted to be a vet but then music entered his life and he became 'Iratxo'. Today retired from public life, the rocker has found peace of mind looking after a foal, Brego, and has created a refuge to take care of animals.

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: The House of Christian Dior launches its 4th Women at Dior mentoring programme. All you ever wanted to know about the origins of the saying ''Rendez-vous A Midi Petante'' (rendezvous bang on midday). Rouvenat: the renaissance of a great name in French jewellery. How to associate burgundy in men's fashion.

programme.title: Littoral
programme.desc: For the last fifteen years, Charles Braine has been practising sustainable fishing using gentle techniques, such as pole and line, on an energy-efficient boat. An activist, he has also set up an association for seafood products, as well as defending his profession before MEPs.

programme.title: Ding Dong : Les Speciaux
programme.desc: Viola and Jan head to Germany. Their trip begins with a visit to Kurt Gminder's recycled and very surprising house, which he started building in 1983! Then on to Mönchengladbach, where an artist couple has transformed a bunker into a home.

programme.title: Le Gout Des Rencontres Normandes
programme.desc: David Gallienne criss-crosses Mont Saint-Michel Bay in Johnny's van, alias Kiki. This former lorry driver has revived a former trade of itinerant grocer.

programme.title: Edmond Et Lucy
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: Pompon Ours
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Pompon Ours
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. programme.title: Il etait Une Fois... Ces Droles D'Objets
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: 1001 Mondes Antiques
programme.desc: Braillard, Colombe and Lablatte have discovered a way of travelling back through ancient eras and civilisations. They embark on a journey back in time, passing through popular civilisations such as ancient Egypt and Greece, as well as sub-Saharan Africa, the Middle East and Mesopotamia.

programme.title: Conte-Nous !
programme.desc: A long, long time ago, in the heart of the African savannah, animals still had the gift of speech. It was also a time of story-telling, of tales that had so much to teach us, where the main character was a lion, a hyena, a leopard or a frog.

programme.title: Quasimodo
programme.desc: Paris, 1483. 16-year-old Quasimodo is a hunchbacked orphan. One day, the gypsy Esmeralda, with whom he is in love, finds herself in trouble. He sacrifices himself to save her and ends up in prison. And so begins a long series of adventures...

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Cosy, Le Mag Deco
programme.desc: Caroline Boeglin goes in search of astonishing lodgings. She shares her love of finding objects in antique markets, her DIY ideas and her interior design touch that transforms a room. Decoration and renovation are the key words for her discoveries.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Le Point
programme.desc: Magazine programme which explores issues relating to society, science and the environment, involving investigations and in-depth analysis, from a resolutely Canadian perspective.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: La Bride Sur Le Cou
programme.desc: Sophie, a model, discovers that her lover Philippe, is interested in someone else. Madly jealous, the young woman has only one thing in mind: use whatever means necessary to break their romance. She begins by being seen in public with other men. Will that suffice to catch the photographer's attention?

programme.title: Foreigners
programme.desc: Jim, 15, is deeply shaken by the arrival of Neil, his British father whom he hasn't seen in five years. The teenager is about to be adopted by his stepfather, with whom he has formed a true bond. But Neil refuses to give up his parental rights...

programme.title: La Nourrice
programme.desc: Disabled following a work accident, Yara spends his time at home assembling miniature models, under the reproaches of his wife. Drug traffickers have also chosen him to secretly guard their loot. Until the day when some disturbing delivery men show up at his door.

programme.title: Cesar Wagner
programme.desc: Wagner attends his mother's wedding in a sumptuous stately home. But behind the scenes tragedy strikes: the body of an unknown man has been found in the cold room. As a favour to his mother, Wagner agrees not to insist that the celebration be cancelled and investigates with his team.

programme.title: Rassemblance
programme.desc: Born in Sarajevo and arriving in Quebec as a child, Jelena fled the war in former Yugoslavia with her parents. Today an actress trained at the Conservatoire d'art dramatique de Quebec, she moves between stage, screen and artistic engagement, driven by a deeply multicultural journey.

programme.title: Boomerang
programme.desc: Following a colleague's sexual assault, Louise, a semi-skilled worker with a strong character, decides it's time to end the permanent ambiance of sexism and bullying that's reigned in their printing works for years. A veritable revolution that Louise and her female colleagues are determined to see through to the end.

programme.title: Fleuve En Eaux Troubles
programme.desc: Decreasing levels of dissolved oxygen in the river's waters are affecting marine life. Researchers analyze the causes of this ecological crisis and explore possible actions.

programme.title: En Marge Du Monde
programme.desc: At 30, Perrine heard the call of the mountains and decided to become an Alpine hut keeper, a difficult and unconventional job. For five years, she has lived without running water or electricity and welcomes visitors at an altitude of 3000 metres. Perrine appreciates this life in a grandiose setting.

programme.title: Chiens Et Chats Sans Collier
programme.desc: Marilys and Cecilia check on Falbala and her eight puppies, victims of a wild abandonment. Polly receives terrible news about a cat placed in a foster home less than a week ago. But the day's adoptions will help lift the whole team's spirits.

programme.title: Outremer.Gourmand
programme.desc: To celebrate the cuisine of the French overseas departments and territories, make a date with each episode featuring a personality from the world of gastronomy. On the menu: discoveries, sharing, and an explosion of flavours!

programme.title: Generation F
programme.desc: In Paris, Richard Orlinski discovers the universe of Jules Bikutsi, a painter of Cameroonian origin whose works question the representation of Black men in Western societies. A rapper and promoter of Congolese rumba, Badi is an engaged artist living in Brussels. Between studio sessions and international stages, he conveys a message of pride and resistance, grounding his lyrics in the memory and struggles of his roots.

programme.title: Contact
programme.desc: Daughter of an Italian immigrant and sociologist by training, she was the first woman in Quebec to be entrusted with a morning show. Today, a columnist in the written press and a television producer, Marie-France Bazzo looks back on her thirty-five-year career in the media.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Le Monde De Jamy
programme.desc: Forests protect us from global warming by absorbing the CO2 we emit. But this precious resource is in danger, weakened in particular by heat and droughts. An investigation into the men and women who fight, sometimes at the risk of their lives, to save the forests.

programme.title: Le Monde De Jamy
programme.desc: Habitat, transport, lighting... At a time when we face global warming and the need to save energy, animals often have the solution! They have learned to adapt to the most extreme environments and deploy incredible ingenuity to survive.

programme.title: Cosy, Le Mag Deco
programme.desc: Caroline Boeglin goes in search of astonishing lodgings. She shares her love of finding objects in antique markets, her DIY ideas and her interior design touch that transforms a room. Decoration and renovation are the key words for her discoveries.

programme.title: Girl Power - Caroline Marx
programme.desc: Caroline Marx takes control and showcases her range of talents! In front of a family audience, amused and amazed, she performs ''quick-change'', mentalism, expert card manipulation, the Rubik's Cube and certain predictions...

programme.title: Serieux ?
programme.desc: Mathieu visits one of Montreal's largest sewage treatment plants. Meanwhile, Marie-eve investigates how we can ''flush'' in a greener way, and tests a bidet for us!

programme.title: Secrets Des Profondeurs
programme.desc: Mario and Sam try to discover the identity of a wreck lying at the bottom of the Saint Lawrence, between Levis and the Island of Orleans.
